summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of purchase return functionality in yarn/chemical ERP system. All 28 test cases passed with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Create partial purchase return (reduces purchase item quantity and lot quantity)
Create full purchase return (deletes purchase record and marks lot as RETURNED)
Verify purchase deletion after full return
Verify lot status changes to RETURNED after full return
GET /api/purchase-returns/:id - Get specific return with items
PUT /api/purchase-returns/:id - Edit return updates quantities correctly
Error handling for invalid purchase ID, missing fields, non-existent returns
Data persistence - returns preserved after purchase deletion with snapshot data
Inventory quantity adjustments for partial and full returns
Business logic validation (lot status checks, quantity validation)
